positive: A majestic, stylized mountain range silhouette at sunset. The composition features layered peaks and valleys, creating a strong, repeating pattern suitable for all-over printing. Incorporate abstract geometric elements like glowing, crystalline edges and minimalist, flowing river designs within the gorges. The style should be a mix of Art Deco geometric simplification and modern celestial cartography. Lighting should be dramatic backlighting, emphasizing strong contrast between the deep indigo/violet shadows and the vibrant, glowing golden-orange and magenta hues of the sky and highlights. The overall color palette is jewel-toned, rich, and high-contrast. Highly detailed vector illustration style, perfect for screen printing on fabric. Central composition, clean lines, graphic design quality.
